assertions.evidence: Lexer test suite covers keywords, identifiers, literals, operators, punctuation, comments, and compound syntax token fixtures.
Lexer test suite asserts token line/column/offset metadata and span end positions.
Lexer test suite passes Unicode identifier cases and nested/deeply nested block comment fixtures.
Negative lexer tests assert Lexer_error positions for unexpected characters, unterminated inputs, multiline errors, and malformed prefixed literals.

frictions: Feature verificationSteps listed dune runtest --no-buffer test/test_lexer.exe, but the runnable command in this repo is dune exec ./test/test_lexer.exe.
